hooks.command: mirdan validate --version 2>/dev/null && echo 'mirdan quality runtime active' || echo 'mirdan not found - install with: pip install mirdan'

hooks.prompt: Before writing code, ensure you have called mcp__mirdan__enhance_prompt for quality requirements. If not yet done, call it first.
A subagent just completed work. If it wrote code, validate quality by calling mcp__mirdan__validate_code_quality on the changed files.
Context is being compressed. Ensure any pending mirdan quality violations are addressed before context is lost.
